business.name: Solihull Heating & Plumbing
business.tagline: Reliable Heating & Plumbing Solutions You Trust

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Absolutely brilliant service. Called in the morning about a boiler fault and it was fixed the same afternoon. Very professional and tidy — would highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: Had a new boiler fitted last month. Great price, clean installation and explained everything clearly. Will definitely use again.

sample_reviews.author: Linda K
sample_reviews.text: Responded quickly to an emergency leak. Sorted the problem fast and left everything spotless. Friendly, honest and fairly priced.

brand.usp: Solihull Heating & Plumbing delivers fast, reliable heating and plumbing services across Birmingham and Solihull, with Gas Safe registered engineers you can trust at honest, transparent prices.
brand.hero_headline: Expert Heating & Plumbing Across Birmingham & Solihull
brand.about_paragraph: We're a locally based heating and plumbing company serving Solihull, Birmingham and the surrounding areas. Whether you need a new boiler, an emergency repair or a full bathroom installation, I bring years of hands-on experience and a genuine commitment to getting the job done right. I take pride in honest pricing, quality workmanship and making sure every customer is left happy.
